principle: If a metric does not help prioritize action, it should not be a core metric.
dashboardPurpose: The dashboard should highlight where improvement effort matters most, not simply show every number available.
dayOneQuestions: What has been marked done but not verified?
What has been verified but not yet cleared by CIS?

dayOneMetrics.name: Total Trace Entries
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Shows overall system activity and signal volume.

dayOneMetrics.name: Open Issues
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Shows unresolved active issues requiring attention.

dayOneMetrics.name: Marked Done
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Shows items marked done by operational users but not yet fully verified.

dayOneMetrics.name: Supervisor Verified
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Shows issues that have been checked and verified by a supervisor.

dayOneMetrics.name: Cleared by CIS
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Shows items cleared from dashboard visibility through Continuous Improvement governance.

dayOneMetrics.name: Entries by Department
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Highlights which departments generate the most trace activity.

dayOneMetrics.name: Entries by Role
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Shows who is using the system and where trace entries are coming from.

dayOneMetrics.name: Entries by Issue Type
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Shows which problem categories are most common.

dayOneMetrics.name: Repeat Issues
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Highlights recurring problems that may require CIS focus.

dayOneMetrics.name: Aging Open Issues
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Shows which unresolved issues have remained open the longest.

dayOneMetrics.name: Top Department by Issue Count
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Identifies the highest-need department at a glance.

dayOneMetrics.name: Top Repeat Issue Type
dayOneMetrics.purpose: Identifies the most common recurring issue for improvement prioritization.
